response.justification: A highly experienced engineer (15+ years, currently Staff-level) with strong software craftsmanship, cloud (AWS CDK), and recent exposure to MCP and agentic workflows at re:cinq. However, the resume shows shallow and very recent GenAI depth, no demonstrated RAG or vector-database experience, and Python — a core required language — is absent from the skills list. The breadth of senior, customer-facing, full-stack delivery makes this candidate worth a screening conversation, but the GenAI/production-AI track record falls short of the 8-years-shipping-AI bar this Staff role demands.
strengths: Deep, broad engineering experience including Staff-level roles and customer-facing delivery
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow infrastructure
Strong cloud (AWS CDK), TypeScript/Node, and TDD/CI-CD craftsmanship
concerns: Python not listed despite being a core required language
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, or evaluation-pipeline experience
GenAI/AI work is recent and thin relative to the 8-years-shipping-AI requirement
